---
title: "🎨 Colors"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    theme: none
    page-layout: full
    embed-resources: true
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito:wght@400;600;700;800;900&family=Fira+Code:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="../shared/_styles.css">
---

```{=html}
<div id="top-navbar">
  <div id="nav-title">
    🇩🇪 German A1 Language
    <span class="subtitle">Beginner Study Notes · <a href="../index.html" style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);text-decoration:none">← Back to Home</a></span>
  </div>
  <!-- AUTO-NAV-START -->
<div id="nav-tabs">
    <a class="nav-tab" href="alphabet.html">🔤 Alphabet</a>
    <a class="nav-tab active" href="colors.html">🎨 Colors</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="communication.html">🗣️ Communication</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="countries.html">🌍 Countries & Languages</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="family.html">👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Family</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="game.html">🎮 Noun Flashcard Game</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="grammar.html">📐 Grammar</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="hobbies.html">🎯 Hobbies</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="komposita.html">🔗 Komposita</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="numbers.html">🔢 Numbers</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="personal.html">👤 Personal Info</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="school.html">🏫 School</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="time.html">📅 Time & Calendar</a>
    <a class="nav-tab" href="flashcards.html">🃏 Flashcard Game</a>
</div>
<!-- AUTO-NAV-END -->
  <div id="nav-dropdown"></div>
</div>
<script src="../shared/_app.js"></script>

<div id="main-content">
  <div class="hero">
    <div class="flags">🇩🇪 🇦🇹 🇨🇭</div>
    <h1>🎨 Colors</h1>
    <p>German A1 Study Notes · Beginner Level · <a href="../index.html" style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.75)">← All Topics</a></p>
  </div>
```

<!-- ═══════════════════════════ SECTION: Colors ═══════════════════════════ -->

::: {#sec-colors }

```{=html}
<div class="topic-banner">
  <div><span class="de-article">die</span><span class="de-word">Farben</span></div>
  <div class="pron-word">[FAR-ben]</div>
  <div class="en-word">Colors / Colours</div>
</div>
```

## Color Swatches {#sub-colorswatches}

```{=html}
<div class="color-grid">
  <div class="color-swatch"><div class="swatch-block" style="background:#e53e3e"></div><div class="swatch-label"><b>rot</b> · red</div></div>
  <div class="color-swatch"><div class="swatch-block" style="background:#3182ce"></div><div class="swatch-label"><b>blau</b> · blue</div></div>
  <div class="color-swatch"><div class="swatch-block" style="background:#38a169"></div><div class="swatch-label"><b>grün</b> · green</div></div>
  <div class="color-swatch"><div class="swatch-block" style="background:#d69e2e"></div><div class="swatch-label"><b>gelb</b> · yellow</div></div>
  <div class="color-swatch"><div class="swatch-block" style="background:#1a202c"></div><div class="swatch-label"><b>schwarz</b> · black</div></div>
  <div class="color-swatch"><div class="swatch-block" style="background:#f7fafc;border:1px solid #e2e8f0"></div><div class="swatch-label"><b>weiß</b> · white</div></div>
  <div class="color-swatch"><div class="swatch-block" style="background:#718096"></div><div class="swatch-label"><b>grau</b> · grey</div></div>
  <div class="color-swatch"><div class="swatch-block" style="background:#92400e"></div><div class="swatch-label"><b>braun</b> · brown</div></div>
  <div class="color-swatch"><div class="swatch-block" style="background:#ed8936"></div><div class="swatch-label"><b>orange</b> · orange</div></div>
  <div class="color-swatch"><div class="swatch-block" style="background:#ed64a6"></div><div class="swatch-label"><b>rosa/pink</b> · pink</div></div>
  <div class="color-swatch"><div class="swatch-block" style="background:#805ad5"></div><div class="swatch-label"><b>lila</b> · purple</div></div>
  <div class="color-swatch"><div class="swatch-block" style="background:#0bc5ea"></div><div class="swatch-label"><b>türkis</b> · turquoise</div></div>
</div>
```

::: {.callout-tip}
Add **hell-** (light) or **dunkel-** (dark) as a prefix:  
**hellgrün** = light green · **dunkelblau** = dark blue
:::

---

## Talking About Colors {#sub-colortalk}

| German | Pronunciation | English |
|--------|---------------|---------|
| Was ist deine Lieblingsfarbe? | [vass ist DY-neh LEEB-lings-far-beh] | What is your favourite color? |
| Meine Lieblingsfarbe ist ___. | [MY-neh LEEB-lings-far-beh ist] | My favourite color is ___. |
| Magst du blau? | [mahkst doo blow] | Do you like blue? |
| Ja, blau mag ich. | [yah blow mahk ikh] | Yes, I like blue. |
| Ja, mir gefällt rot. | [yah meer geh-FELT roht] | Yes, I like red. |

:::


```{=html}
<div style="text-align:center;margin-top:3rem;padding:1.5rem;color:#9333ea;font-size:.9rem;">
  <a href="../index.html" style="color:#7c3aed;font-weight:700;text-decoration:none">← Back to All Topics</a>
  &nbsp;·&nbsp; <em>Viel Erfolg!</em> (Good luck!)
</div>
</div><!-- /main-content -->
```
